name: 1'6"x2'6" Pastel Floral Outdoor Coir Doormat - Room Essentials™
description:
Add a charming touch to your entryway with this Pastel Floral Outdoor Doormat from Room Essentials™. The rectangular outdoor doormat features charming florals in pastel hues for a lovely look. Made from 100% coir fibers, this medium-pile doormat helps remove dirt and debris from shoes at the door, and the latex backing keeps it in place.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
